activities.title: Route Tool Call to Backend
activities.description: Evaluate session remote target config, select LocalToolBackend or RemoteToolBackend

activities.title: Serialize Tool Request
activities.description: Convert tool call parameters to agent JSON protocol message (exec/read/write/glob/git)

activities.title: Transmit Request via Tunnel
activities.description: Write serialized JSON to SSH tunnel stdin, await response on stdout

activities.title: Deserialize Tool Response
activities.description: Parse agent JSON response, extract result/error/metadata, normalize to local format

activities.title: Deliver Result to Session
activities.description: Return normalized tool result to LLM session, indistinguishable from local execution

arrows.label: Routed Tool Call with Backend Selection
